title: NANG CREAM WHIPPER (500 ML) | Nangs Delivery Brisbane
description: Most trusted Nangs Delivery Brisbane. Get high-quality cream chargers, cream whippers, whipped cream dispensers, & nangs delivered across Brisbane
og_title: NANG CREAM WHIPPER (500 ML) | Nangs Delivery Brisbane
og_description: The perfect whipped cream dispenser for home use. With Supreme whip Cream Whipper, you can prepare delicious cold ingredients such as whipped creams, sauces, mousses and all those light and spumous delights. This standard size 0.5L whipper will make up to 1.5L of fresh whipped cream in an instant! Compatible with any 8g Nitrous Oxide Cream Charger. N2O also acts as a natural anti-biotic so the cream stays fresh in the whipper for up to 10 days if kept in a fridge.
